rows.label: xs32150100_MSG0010
rows.name: Thank you very much, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32150100_MSG0020
rows.name:
It's truly a shame that we lost our comrades,
but he completed his mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32150100_MSG0030
rows.name: We have to praise him for that, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32150100_MSG0110
rows.name: We won't let these lives go to waste.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32150100_MSG0120
rows.name: I hate to interrupt when you're all fired up, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32150100_MSG0130
rows.name: how is the Ares's analysis progressing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32150100_MSG0140
rows.name: It's making wonderful progress thanks to you all, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32150100_MSG0150
rows.name:
There's something we'd like to tell you,
so we want you to come to the quarantine hangar afterward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32150100_MSG0170
rows.name: A lot happened, but the mission is complete.[ST:wait ]
